all_review_reasons: Margin note 'Pert n di Buel and Fusin in Futs' is illegible and potentially contains misspellings or unclear medical terminology. Requires human review to interpret clinical relevance.
Margin note 'Back' is ambiguous. While it may refer to back pain, the context is unclear without further clarification. Requires human review to confirm clinical relevance.
The notation 'Never 2/day' under the 'Pain' field is ambiguous. It is unclear whether 'Never' indicates no medication is taken, or if '2/day' is a separate note or error.
The symbol '$' under 'High Blood Pressure' is not standard medical notation. It may indicate cost concern, but its clinical meaning is unclear.
The handwritten entry 'Chuleti' under 'Other' is not a standard medication name. It may be a brand name or a misspelling, requiring verification.
The date '11/08/2026' was extracted, but the handwritten '5' in '2025' is circled, suggesting the intended year is 2025. This requires human review to confirm the correct year.
The patient reports 'NO' bad breath both before and after the injury, but the Halitosis Meter Reading is '4' (Moderate Odor). This is a contradiction that needs human review to resolve.
The extracted value 'Dniz / Dnsluth' is ambiguous and may be a shorthand or misspelling. It requires clarification from the patient or clinician.
The extracted value '8-12-15' is ambiguous. It may indicate a range of hours or an irregular schedule, which requires human review to confirm.
